prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约15090名→10525名→10246名→16561名→14473名，整体呈"V"型波动，2022-2023年位次明显前移后，2024年大幅后移至16561名，2025年回升至14473名，近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准约14473名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021-2023年均为36人，2024年增至49人，2025年47人，2026年计划47人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，供需弹性影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2025年第61名、2026年第63名，排名大幅跃升，学校综合实力和声誉显著提升，对考生吸引力增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因2025年北京中医药大学在河北、河南等地录取位次较2024年下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档信号，可能对2026年报考心理产生一定滞后影响；抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；中医学、中西医结合、中药学均为A+学科（第五轮评估），作为全国中医药院校中唯一的211高校，在中医药领域具有绝对领先优势，对有志于医学的考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业连续多年高热推荐，中医学/中药学作为医学大类核心专业社会热度持续走高；黑龙江省2026年物理类考生约11.4万人，较2025年减少约3500人，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14473名、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名大幅上升带来的吸引力增强、医学类专业持续高热、声誉偏负面信号以及物理类考生小幅减少等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在14473名基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约14503名，区间14003-15003名。

- 中西医临床医学（华佗班）
- 中医学（卓越5+3一体化）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 15090 → 10525 → 10246 → 16561 → 14473, showing a 'V'-shaped fluctuation. Rankings significantly advanced in 2022-2023, then sharply retreated to 16561 in 2024, and rebounded to 14473 in 2025, with large fluctuations in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 14473. The enrollment plan in Heilongjiang for physics category was 36 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 49 in 2024, 47 in 2025, and planned 47 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with neutral supply-demand elasticity impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Soft Science Chinese University Rankings rose from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, a significant leap, enhancing comprehensive strength and attractiveness to candidates. Reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to a drop of over 500 places in admission rankings in Hebei, Henan, etc. in 2025, and signal of gaps in Chinese Medicine major in Heilongjiang, Jilin, etc., potentially causing a lagged impact on 2026 application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 103rd, rated average, with low short-video platform exposure. Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica are all A+ disciplines (5th round evaluation). As the only 211 university among Chinese medicine institutions, it holds absolute leading advantages in the field, strongly attracting candidates interested in medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine, Stomatology and other medical majors have been highly recommended for consecutive years. Chinese Medicine/Chinese Materia Medica, as core majors in the medical category, continue to see rising social popularity. In 2026, Heilongjiang has about 114,000 physics category candidates, a decrease of about 3,500 from 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 14473, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, increased attractiveness from Soft Science ranking rise, sustained high popularity of medical majors, slightly negative reputation signals, and a small decrease in physics category candidates, the 2026 minimum admission ranking is expected to slightly retreat from 14473. Predicted minimum ranking is about 14503, with a range of 14003-15003.

- Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class)
- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program).

- Chinese Medicine

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14003-15003, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Leading Talent/Hua Tuo Class/Excellent 5+3) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 14000), prioritize Tier 1 Chinese Medicine long-term programs; for rankings near the upper bound (around 15000), mainly apply for Tier 3 majors for a stable admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1301 → 775 → 3195 → 1887 → 1376, with significant fluctuations overall. A notable backward shift occurred in 2023 (3195), followed by a recovery to 1887 in 2024 and further advancement to 1376 in 2025, showing a forward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1376. The university's history category enrollment plan in Heilongjiang was 5 in 2021, 4 in 2022-2023, 2 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 5 in 2026, an increase of 1 (25%) compared to 2025. Expansion reduces competition intensity, so the ranking number should increase somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has risen continuously from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, a significant improvement that enhances overall strength and attractiveness to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to declining admission rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other provinces in 2025, and signs of gaps in Chinese medicine admissions in Heilongjiang, Jilin, etc., which may affect application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 103rd, with average reviews. Chinese medicine, integrated Chinese and Western medicine, and Chinese materia medica are all A+ disciplines. As the only 211 Chinese medicine university nationwide, it has irreplaceable disciplinary advantages in the field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to be highly popular in society. In 2026, Heilongjiang has approximately 53,000 history category candidates, a decrease of about 1,600 from 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1376, a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 (4→5), rising Soft Science rankings, sustained medical popularity, slightly negative reputation, and a small decrease in history category candidates, expansion is the main factor. The minimum admission ranking is expected to shift backward from 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 1562, and a range of 1062-2062.
